## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create docs page for colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and radii
- Include code snippets and visual swatches
- Add do/don't examples for common misuse patterns
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Every token includes name, value, usage context
  - Examples rendered for light/dark where applicable
  - Accessibility notes included for color usage

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Token docs page complete and easy to scan
- [ ] Example snippets available for developers
- [ ] Do/don't examples cover common mistakes
- [ ] PR includes screenshots of each docs section
